name: logging-memory-context-visibility
description: LoggingMemory (UnconstrainedMemory subclass) logs every message added/removed/reset in an agent's context into the same JSONL stream, tagged with the agent name and ambient run_id — otherwise 'what actually went into an agent's context' is only inspectable with a debugger. Previews render tool calls/results by content type because message.text is empty for them.
invariants: add_many() funnels through add() in BaseMemory, so overriding add/delete/reset covers every mutation path
clone() must return a LoggingMemory preserving agent_name (HandoffTool clones worker memory on delegation)
contracts: Emits memory_message_added / memory_message_removed / memory_reset events with role, 200-char preview, and memory_size
